rows.ticket: How do I add a teammate to my account?
rows.baseline_answer: To add a teammate to your Stratus Forms account, navigate to **Settings → Account**. From there, you will find options for team member management.

rows.ticket: Where do I update my billing address?
rows.baseline_answer:
To update your billing address, navigate to **Settings → Account** within your Stratus Forms account. Billing contacts can update payment methods there.

I hope this helps! Let me know if you have any other questions.

rows.ticket: How do I change my email address?
rows.baseline_answer: To change your email address, navigate to Settings → Account within your Stratus Forms account. You should be able to update your contact information there. If you encounter any issues, please let us know!
rows.economy_answer: I can help with that! You can change your email address in your account settings. Navigate to Settings → Account to update your email address.
